parameters.description: Send notifications to your own D7 Networks destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise d7sms:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's D7 Networks targets

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's D7 Networks token
